controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - income recognition, asset classification and provisioning) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and
Provisioning) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - income recognition, asset classification and provisioning) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to following non-banking finance companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfcs' and individually as a 'nbfc')
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall apply to following Non-Banking Finance
Companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'NBFCs' and individually as a
'NBFC').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to following non-banking finance companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfcs' and individually as a 'nbfc')

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to housing finance company registered with the rbi under nhb act, 1987
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these directions shall apply to Housing Finance Company
registered with the RBI under NHB Act, 1987;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to housing finance company registered with the rbi under nhb act, 1987

controls.control_objective: To ensure prevail in the event of conflict
controls.control_description:
The instructions contained in the Reserve Bank of
India (Housing Finance Company) Directions, 2025 shall prevail in the event of
conflict, if any, with these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prevail in the event of conflict

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to nbfc-micro finance institution registered with the rbi under rbi act, 1934
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these directions shall apply to NBFC-Micro Finance Institution
registered with the RBI under RBI Act, 1934;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to nbfc-micro finance institution registered with the rbi under rbi act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure prevail in the event of conflict
controls.control_description:
The
instructions contained in the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Microfinance Institution) Directions, 2025 shall prevail in the event
of conflict, if any, with these Directions, with these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prevail in the event of conflict

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to mortgage guarantee company registered with the rbi under rbi act, 1934
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these directions shall apply to Mortgage Guarantee Company
registered with the RBI under RBI Act, 1934;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to mortgage guarantee company registered with the rbi under rbi act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure prevail in the event of conflict
controls.control_description:
The instructions contained in the
Reserve Bank of India (Mortgage Guarantee Companies) Directions, 2025 shall
prevail in the event of conflict, if any, with these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prevail in the event of conflict

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to core investment company registered with the rbi under rbi act, 1934
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these directions shall apply to Core Investment Company
registered with the RBI under RBI Act, 1934;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to core investment company registered with the rbi under rbi act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure prevail in the event of conflict
controls.control_description:
The instructions contained in the Reserve Bank of
India (Core Investment Companies) Directions, 2025 shall prevail in the event of
conflict, if any, with these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prevail in the event of conflict

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be guided by the standards and the advisories issued by the <image> institute of chartered accountants of india (icai advisories) in case
controls.control_description:
An NBFC which is required to comply with Indian Accounting Standards (Ind AS)
shall continue to be guided by the Standards and the advisories issued by the
<image>
Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI Advisories) in case of any
inconsistencies between these Directions and the Standards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be guided by the standards and the advisories issued by the <image> institute of chartered accountants of india (icai advisories) in case

controls.control_objective: To ensure also follow the prudential guidelines on income recognition, asset classification and provisioning of advances for restructured accounts as prescribed
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall also follow the prudential guidelines on income recognition, asset
classification and provisioning of advances for restructured accounts as
prescribed in the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies -
Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025, in addition to these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to also follow the prudential guidelines on income recognition, asset classification and provisioning of advances for restructured accounts as prescribed

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meaning assigned to them below: (1) 'loss asset' shall mean either of the following: 1 substituted with effect from july 01, 2026 vide reserv
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall
bear the meaning assigned to them below:
(1) 'loss asset' shall mean either of the following:
1 Substituted with effect from July 01, 2026 vide Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Registration, Exemptions and Framework for Scale Based Regulation) Amendment Directions, 2026 dated April 29, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meaning assigned to them below: (1) 'loss asset' shall mean either of the following: 1 substituted with effect from july 01, 2026 vide reserv

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as 'overdue' if it is not paid on the due date fixed by the nbfc
controls.control_description:
(2) 'overdue' status - any amount due to a NBFC under any credit facility
shall be treated as 'overdue' if it is not paid on the due date fixed by the
NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as 'overdue' if it is not paid on the due date fixed by the nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean the asset in respect of which, no default in repayment of principal or payment of interest is perceived and which does not disclose any problem o
controls.control_description:
(3) 'standard asset' shall mean the asset in respect of which, no default in
repayment of principal or payment of interest is perceived and which
does not disclose any problem or carry more than normal risk attached
to the business.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to mean the asset in respect of which, no default in repayment of principal or payment of interest is perceived and which does not disclose any problem o

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean the same as defined under the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - treatment of wilful defaulters and large defaulters) direc
controls.control_description:
(4) 'wilful defaulter' shall mean the same as defined under the Reserve Bank
of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Treatment of Wilful
Defaulters and Large Defaulters) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean the same as defined under the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - treatment of wilful defaulters and large defaulters) direc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in terms of the circular fidd
controls.control_description:
The definitions of the terms 'Micro Enterprises', 'Small Enterprises', and 'Medium
Enterprises' shall be in terms of the circular FIDD.MSME &
NFS.BC.No.3/06.02.31/2020-21 dated July 2, 2020 on 'Credit flow to Micro,
Small and Medium Enterprises Sector' as updated from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in terms of the circular fidd

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning assigned to them in the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - credit facilities) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
The terms 'Commercial Real Estate (CRE)', 'Commercial Real Estate -
Residential Housing Sector (CRE - RH)', 'project finance', and 'financial closure'
shall have the same meaning assigned to them in the Reserve Bank of India
(Non-Banking Financial Companies - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning assigned to them in the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - credit facilities) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934, or the companies ac
controls.control_description:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the
Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, or the Companies Act, 2013, or any statutory
modification or re-enactment thereto or other regulations issued by the Reserve
<image>
Bank or the Glossary of Terms published by the Reserve Bank or as used in
commercial parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934, or the companies ac

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the following instructions in respect of all loans sanctioned on or after december 31, 2021: (1) the exact due dates for repayment of a lo
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall comply with the following instructions in respect of all loans
sanctioned on or after December 31, 2021:
(1) The exact due dates for repayment of a loan, frequency of repayment,
breakup between principal and interest, examples of dates of
classification as special mention account (SMA) / non-performing asset
(NPA), etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the following instructions in respect of all loans sanctioned on or after december 31, 2021: (1) the exact due dates for repayment of a lo

controls.control_objective: To ensure be clearly specified in the loan agreement
controls.control_description: shall be clearly specified in the loan agreement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be clearly specified in the loan agreement

controls.control_objective: To ensure be apprised of the same at the time of loan sanction and also at the time of subsequent changes
controls.control_description:
(2) The borrower shall be apprised of the same at the time of loan sanction
and also at the time of subsequent changes, if any, to the sanction terms
/ loan agreement till full repayment of the loan.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be apprised of the same at the time of loan sanction and also at the time of subsequent changes

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be specified in the loan agreements
controls.control_description:
(3) In cases of loan facilities with moratorium on payment of principal and /
or interest, the exact date of commencement of repayment shall also be
specified in the loan agreements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be specified in the loan agreements

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured as and when such loans become due for renewal / review
controls.control_description:
In case of loans sanctioned before December 31, 2021, compliance to the
instructions in paragraph 15 shall be ensured as and when such loans become
due for renewal / review.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured as and when such loans become due for renewal / review

controls.control_objective: To ensure implement the following instructions to increasing awareness among the borrowers: (1) place consumer education literature on its websites, explaining
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall implement the following instructions to increasing awareness
among the borrowers:
(1) place consumer education literature on its websites, explaining with
examples, the concepts of date of overdue, SMA and NPA classification
and upgradation, with specific reference to day-end process;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to implement the following instructions to increasing awareness among the borrowers: (1) place consumer education literature on its websites, explaining

controls.control_objective: To ensure of posters and / or other appropriate media
controls.control_description:
(2) consider displaying such consumer education literature in its branches
by means of posters and / or other appropriate media;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to of posters and / or other appropriate media

controls.control_objective: To ensure flag a borrower account as overdue
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall flag a borrower account as overdue, if so, as part of their day-end
processes for the due date, irrespective of the time of running such processes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to flag a borrower account as overdue

controls.control_objective: To ensure be done as part of day-end process for the relevant date and the sma or npa classification date shall be the calendar date for which the day end proce
controls.control_description:
Similarly, classification of borrower accounts as SMA as well as NPA shall be
done as part of day-end process for the relevant date and the SMA or NPA
classification date shall be the calendar date for which the day end process is
run.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be done as part of day-end process for the relevant date and the sma or npa classification date shall be the calendar date for which the day end proce

controls.control_objective: To ensure reflect the asset classification status of an account at the day-end of that calendar date
controls.control_description:
Thus, the date of SMA / NPA shall reflect the asset classification status of
an account at the day-end of that calendar date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reflect the asset classification status of an account at the day-end of that calendar date

controls.control_objective: To ensure be march 31, 2021
controls.control_description:
Illustration I:
If due date of a loan account is March 31, 2021, and full dues are
not received before the NBFC runs the day-end process for this date, the date of
overdue shall be March 31, 2021.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be march 31, 2021

controls.control_objective: To ensure get tagged as sma-1 upon running day-end process on april 30, 2021 i
controls.control_description:
If it continues to remain overdue, then this
account shall get tagged as SMA-1 upon running day-end process on April 30,
2021 i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to get tagged as sma-1 upon running day-end process on april 30, 2021 i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be april 30, 2021
controls.control_description:
Accordingly,
the date of SMA-1 classification for that account shall be April 30, 2021.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be april 30, 2021

controls.control_objective: To ensure get tagged as sma- 2 upon running day-end process on may 30, 2021 and if continues to remain overdue further, it shall get classified as npa upon runn
controls.control_description:
Similarly, if the account continues to remain overdue, it shall get tagged as SMA-
2 upon running day-end process on May 30, 2021 and if continues to remain
overdue further, it shall get classified as NPA upon running day-end process on
June 29, 2021.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to get tagged as sma- 2 upon running day-end process on may 30, 2021 and if continues to remain overdue further, it shall get classified as npa upon runn

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to the microfinance loan portfolio of a nbfc-mfi
controls.control_description:
The instructions in paragraphs 21 to 27 shall not apply to the microfinance loan
portfolio of a NBFC-MFI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to the microfinance loan portfolio of a nbfc-mfi

controls.control_objective: To ensure , after taking into account the degree of well-defined credit weaknesses and extent of dependence on collateral security for realisation, classify its
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall, after taking into account the degree of well-defined credit
weaknesses and extent of dependence on collateral security for realisation,
classify its lease / hire purchase assets, loans and advances and any other forms
of credit into the following classes: (i) Standard assets;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , after taking into account the degree of well-defined credit weaknesses and extent of dependence on collateral security for realisation, classify its

controls.control_objective: To ensure also follow the requirements contained in the reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - resolution of stressed assets) directions, 202
controls.control_description:
The above asset classification shall
also follow the requirements contained in the Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025
for cases of resolution of stressed loans and advances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also follow the requirements contained in the reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - resolution of stressed assets) directions, 202

controls.control_objective: To ensure be upgraded merely as a result of rescheduling
controls.control_description:
The class of assets referred to in paragraph 21 shall not be upgraded merely as
a result of rescheduling, unless it satisfies the conditions required for the
upgradation as laid out in the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be upgraded merely as a result of rescheduling

controls.control_objective: To ensure be borrower-wise and not facility-wise
controls.control_description: Asset classification shall be borrower-wise and not facility-wise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be borrower-wise and not facility-wise

controls.control_objective: To ensure have to be treated as npa / non-performing investment (npi) and not the particular facility / investment or part thereof which has become irregular
controls.control_description:
All the facilities
granted by an NBFC to a borrower and investment in all the securities issued by
the borrower shall have to be treated as NPA / Non-Performing Investment (NPI)
and not the particular facility / investment or part thereof which has become
irregular.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have to be treated as npa / non-performing investment (npi) and not the particular facility / investment or part thereof which has become irregular

controls.control_objective: To ensure be upgraded as 'standard' asset only if entire arrears of interest and principal are paid by the borrower
controls.control_description:
Loan accounts classified as NPAs may be upgraded as 'standard' asset only if
entire arrears of interest and principal are paid by the borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be upgraded as 'standard' asset only if entire arrears of interest and principal are paid by the borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure be upgraded from npa to standard asset category only upon repayment of entire arrears of interest and principal pertaining to all the credit facilitie
controls.control_description:
In case of borrowers having more than one credit facility, loan accounts shall be
upgraded from NPA to standard asset category only upon repayment of entire
arrears of interest and principal pertaining to all the credit facilities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be upgraded from npa to standard asset category only upon repayment of entire arrears of interest and principal pertaining to all the credit facilitie

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable in addition to compliance with these directions
controls.control_description:
With regard to upgradation of accounts classified as NPA due to restructuring,
non-achievement of date of commence of commercial operations (DCCO), etc.,
the instructions contained in the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025 shall be applicable
in addition to compliance with these directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable in addition to compliance with these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - transfer and distribution of credit risk) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
The asset classification and provisioning requirements in respect of transactions
involving transfer of loans shall be as per the Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Transfer and Distribution of Credit Risk)
Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as per the reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - transfer and distribution of credit risk) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure be retained as such upon implementation
controls.control_description:
If a resolution plan is implemented in adherence to the provisions of Chapter
VI-A of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Resolution
of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025 dated November 28, 2025, borrower
accounts which are classified as 'Standard' may be retained as such upon
implementation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be retained as such upon implementation

controls.control_objective: To ensure be upgraded as 'standard', upon implementation of the resolution plan
controls.control_description:
Borrower accounts which may have slipped into NPA between
the date of occurrence of the calamity and implementation of the resolution plan,
shall be upgraded as 'Standard', upon implementation of the resolution plan.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be upgraded as 'standard', upon implementation of the resolution plan

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed by the criteria laid out in these directions
controls.control_description:
Provided that after implementation of the resolution plan, the subsequent asset
classification shall be governed by the criteria laid out in these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be governed by the criteria laid out in these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be classified as 'standard'
controls.control_description:
Accounts which are restructured under paragraph 122E to 122L of the Reserve
Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Resolution of Stressed
Assets) Directions, 2025 dated November 28, 2025, where a subsequent
restructuring is necessitated under the provisions of Chapter VI-A of the
aforesaid Directions, shall continue to be classified as 'Standard'.]
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be classified as 'standard'

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown separately as 'contingent provisions against standard assets' in the balance sheet
controls.control_description:
The provision towards standard assets need not be netted from gross advances
but shall be shown separately as 'Contingent Provisions against Standard
Assets' in the balance sheet.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown separately as 'contingent provisions against standard assets' in the balance sheet

controls.control_objective: To ensure , after taking into account the time lag between an account becoming non-performing, its recognition as such, the realisation of the security and the
controls.control_description:
An NBFC (excluding microfinance loan portfolio of a NBFC-MFI) shall, after
taking into account the time lag between an account becoming non-performing,
its recognition as such, the realisation of the security and the erosion over time
in the value of security charged, make provision against sub-standard assets,
doubtful assets and loss assets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , after taking into account the time lag between an account becoming non-performing, its recognition as such, the realisation of the security and the

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain a general provision at the following rates for the funded outstanding on a portfolio basis: operational phase - after commencement of constru
controls.control_description:
Project Finance
(1) For project finance exposures, an NBFC shall maintain a general
provision at the following rates for the funded outstanding on a portfolio
basis:
Operational Phase - after commencement of
Construction
repayment of interest and principal (in per
Phase (in per cent)
cent) CRE 1.25 1.00 CRE-RH 1.00 0.75 All others 1.00 0.40
(2) For accounts which have availed DCCO deferment and are classified as
'standard', an NBFC shall maintain additional specific provisions as per
the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Company -
Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain a general provision at the following rates for the funded outstanding on a portfolio basis: operational phase - after commencement of constru

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable for projects where financial closure has been achieved as on october 1, 2025, and such project loans shall continue to be guided <image>
controls.control_description:
(3) The provisions stipulated in sub-paragraphs (1) and (2) above shall not
be applicable for projects where financial closure has been achieved as
on October 1, 2025, and such project loans shall continue to be guided
<image>
by the prudential guidelines prevailing before October 1, 2025 for the
purpose of provisioning, which otherwise shall be treated as repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable for projects where financial closure has been achieved as on october 1, 2025, and such project loans shall continue to be guided <image>

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to these projects as if these were sanctioned post october 1, 2025
controls.control_description:
(4) Notwithstanding sub-paragraph (3), in case of any resolution of a fresh
credit event and / or change in material terms and conditions in the loan
contract in such projects, subsequent to October 1, 2025, the provisions
stipulated in sub-paragraphs (1) and (2) above shall apply to these
projects as if these were sanctioned post October 1, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to these projects as if these were sanctioned post october 1, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure be fully provided for
controls.control_description:
Provisioning norms for liquidity facility provided for securitisation transactions -
The amount of liquidity facility drawn and outstanding for more than 90 days, in
respect of securitisation transactions undertaken in terms of the Reserve Bank
of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Securitisation Transactions)
Directions, 2025, shall be fully provided for.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be fully provided for

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as under: (1) sub-standard assets - a general provision of ten per cent of total outstanding shall be made
controls.control_description:
The provisioning requirement for NPAs (excluding microfinance loan portfolio of
NBFC-MFI) in respect of loans, advances and other credit facilities including bills
purchased and discounted as well as project loans shall be as under:
(1) Sub-standard assets - A general provision of ten per cent of total
outstanding shall be made.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as under: (1) sub-standard assets - a general provision of ten per cent of total outstanding shall be made

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made
controls.control_description:
(i) 100 per cent provision to the extent to which the advance is not
covered by the realisable value of the security to which the NBFC-
BL has a valid recourse shall be made.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made on the following basis: period for which the asset has been considered as doubtful provision (in per cent) up to one year 20 one to three year
controls.control_description:
estimated realisable value
of the outstanding) shall be made on the following basis:
Period for which the asset has been considered as doubtful
Provision (in per cent)
Up to one year 20 One to three years 30 More than three years 50
<image>
(3) Loss Assets - The entire asset shall be written off.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made on the following basis: period for which the asset has been considered as doubtful provision (in per cent) up to one year 20 one to three year

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided for
controls.control_description:
If the assets are
permitted to remain in the books for any reason, 100 per cent of the
outstanding shall be provided for.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided for

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as under: (1) in respect of hire purchase assets, the total dues (overdue and future instalments taken together) as reduced by the following compon
controls.control_description:
The provisioning requirements in respect of hire purchase and leased assets
shall be as under:
(1) In respect of hire purchase assets, the total dues (overdue and future
instalments taken together) as reduced by the following components
shall be provided for.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as under: (1) in respect of hire purchase assets, the total dues (overdue and future instalments taken together) as reduced by the following compon

controls.control_objective: To ensure be notionally computed as the original cost of the asset to be reduced by depreciation at the rate of 20 percent per annum on a straight-line method
controls.control_description:
(2) For the purpose of sub-paragraph (1), the depreciated value of the asset
shall be notionally computed as the original cost of the asset to be
reduced by depreciation at the rate of 20 percent per annum on a
straight-line method.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be notionally computed as the original cost of the asset to be reduced by depreciation at the rate of 20 percent per annum on a straight-line method

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the actual cost incurred for acquisition of such second-hand asset
controls.control_description:
Also, in the case of second-hand asset, the original
cost shall be the actual cost incurred for acquisition of such second-hand
asset.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the actual cost incurred for acquisition of such second-hand asset

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made as under: nil
controls.control_description:
(3) In respect of hire purchase and leased assets, additional provision shall
be made as under:
Nil
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made as under: nil

controls.control_objective: To ensure be fully provided for
controls.control_description:
(ii) Where hire charges or lease rentals are overdue for more than 12 months up to 24 months
40 per cent of the net book value (iv) Where hire charges or lease rentals are overdue
for more than 24 months but up to 36 months
70 per cent of the net book value (v) Where hire charges or lease rentals are overdue for more than 48 months
for more than 36 months but up to 48 months
100 per cent of the net book value
(4) On expiry of a period of 12 months after the due date of the last
instalment of hire purchase / leased asset, the entire net book value shall
be fully provided for.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be fully provided for

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deducted against the provisions stipulated in sub- paragraph (1) above
controls.control_description:
<image>
(5) The amount of caution money / margin money or security deposits kept
by the borrower with the NBFC in pursuance of the hire purchase
agreement may be deducted against the provisions stipulated in sub-
paragraph (1) above, if not already taken into account while arriving at
the equated monthly instalments under the agreement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deducted against the provisions stipulated in sub- paragraph (1) above

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deducted only against the provisions stipulated under sub-paragraph (3) above
controls.control_description:
(6) The value of any other security available in pursuance to the hire
purchase agreement shall be deducted only against the provisions
stipulated under sub-paragraph (3) above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deducted only against the provisions stipulated under sub-paragraph (3) above

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deducted only against the provisions stipulated under sub-paragraph (3) above
controls.control_description:
(7) The amount of security deposits kept by the borrower with the NBFC in
pursuance to the lease agreement together with the value of any other
security available in pursuance to the lease agreement shall be deducted
only against the provisions stipulated under sub-paragraph (3) above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deducted only against the provisions stipulated under sub-paragraph (3) above

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken as reason for not making provision
controls.control_description:
The fact
that income on an NPA has not been recognised shall not be taken as
reason for not making provision.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken as reason for not making provision

controls.control_objective: To ensure attract the provisioning requirements as applicable to hire purchase assets
controls.control_description:
(9) All financial leases written on or after April 1, 2001 shall attract the
provisioning requirements as applicable to hire purchase assets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to attract the provisioning requirements as applicable to hire purchase assets

controls.control_objective: To ensure hold impairment allowances as required by ind as
controls.control_description:
An NBFC required to comply with Indian Accounting Standards (IndAS) shall
hold impairment allowances as required by Ind AS.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hold impairment allowances as required by ind as

controls.control_objective: To ensure also maintain the asset classification and compute provisions as per these directions including standard asset provisioning, borrower / beneficiary wi
controls.control_description:
In parallel, the NBFC shall
also maintain the asset classification and compute provisions as per these
Directions including standard asset provisioning, borrower / beneficiary wise
classification, provisioning for standard as well as restructured assets, NPA
ageing, etc., which shall act as the prudential floor for provisioning requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also maintain the asset classification and compute provisions as per these directions including standard asset provisioning, borrower / beneficiary wi

controls.control_objective: To ensure appropriate the difference from their net profit or loss after tax to a separate 'impairment reserve'
controls.control_description:
Where impairment allowance under Ind AS 109 is lower than the prudential floor,
the NBFC shall appropriate the difference from their net profit or loss after tax to
a separate 'Impairment Reserve'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appropriate the difference from their net profit or loss after tax to a separate 'impairment reserve'

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned for regulatory capital
controls.control_description:
The balance in the 'Impairment Reserve' shall
not be reckoned for regulatory capital.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned for regulatory capital

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted <image> from this reserve without prior permission from the department of supervision, reserve bank of india
controls.control_description:
Further, no withdrawals shall be permitted
<image>
from this reserve without prior permission from the Department of Supervision,
Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted <image> from this reserve without prior permission from the department of supervision, reserve bank of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned for calculating net npas
controls.control_description:
The appropriation specified in paragraph 35 shall be considered for the
computation of the prudential floor, but shall not be reckoned for calculating net
NPAs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned for calculating net npas

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider the dlg for determining provisions under the expected credit loss framework across all stages
controls.control_description:
For loan portfolios covered by Default Loss Guarantee (DLG) arrangements in
terms of Chapter III of the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025 and Part B of the Reserve Bank
of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Transfer and Distribution of Credit
Risk) Directions, 2025 both dated November 28, 2025, an NBFC may consider the
DLG for determining provisions under the Expected Credit Loss framework across
all stages, subject to the requirements as laid down under Indian Accounting
Standards, which inter alia require the DLG arrangement to be integral to the
contractual terms of the loan and the DLG not being recognised separately.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to consider the dlg for determining provisions under the expected credit loss framework across all stages

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the disclosure requirements as prescribed under indas 1
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall comply with the disclosure requirements as prescribed under
IndAS 1.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the disclosure requirements as prescribed under indas 1

controls.control_objective: To ensure recompute their ecl provisioning requirements across stages, after duly adjusting for the reduced dlg cover
controls.control_description:
Since upon every event of invocation of DLG, the DLG cover reduces to the extent
of invocation, an NBFC shall recompute their ECL provisioning requirements
across stages, after duly adjusting for the reduced DLG cover.]
4[C2.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to recompute their ecl provisioning requirements across stages, after duly adjusting for the reduced dlg cover

controls.control_objective: To ensure make an additional specific provision of five percent of the outstanding debt in respect of borrowers, for whom a resolution plan has been implemented
controls.control_description:
A NBFC shall make an additional specific provision of five percent of the
outstanding debt in respect of borrowers, for whom a resolution plan has been
implemented in terms of Chapter VI-A of the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make an additional specific provision of five percent of the outstanding debt in respect of borrowers, for whom a resolution plan has been implemented

controls.control_objective: To ensure be over and above the applicable prudential provisions subject to a ceiling of hundred per cent
controls.control_description:
<image>
additional specific provisions shall be over and above the applicable prudential
provisions subject to a ceiling of hundred per cent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be over and above the applicable prudential provisions subject to a ceiling of hundred per cent

controls.control_objective: To ensure make additional specific provisioning of five per cent of the outstanding debt for each instance of restructuring made under the aforesaid directions
controls.control_description:
For accounts where repeated restructuring is necessitated in terms of Chapter VI-
A of the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Resolution
of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025, a NBFC shall make additional specific
provisioning of five per cent of the outstanding debt for each instance of
restructuring made under the aforesaid Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make additional specific provisioning of five per cent of the outstanding debt for each instance of restructuring made under the aforesaid directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be over and above the applicable prudential provisions subject to a ceiling of hundred per cent
controls.control_description:
This additional specific
provisioning shall be over and above the applicable prudential provisions subject
to a ceiling of hundred per cent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be over and above the applicable prudential provisions subject to a ceiling of hundred per cent

controls.control_objective: To ensure be written back upon the borrower paying at least 20% of the outstanding debt with the nbfc, without slipping into npa post implementation of the rest
controls.control_description:
The additional specific provisions maintained in terms of paragraph 36D and 36E
above may be written back upon the borrower paying at least 20% of the
outstanding debt with the NBFC, without slipping into NPA post implementation of
the restructuring, and without being subjected to another restructuring.]
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be written back upon the borrower paying at least 20% of the outstanding debt with the nbfc, without slipping into npa post implementation of the rest

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on recognised accounting principles
controls.control_description: The income recognition shall be based on recognised accounting principles.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be based on recognised accounting principles

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recognised only when it is actually realised
controls.control_description:
Income including interest / discount / hire charges / lease rentals or any other
charges on NPA shall be recognised only when it is actually realised.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recognised only when it is actually realised

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reversed
controls.control_description:
Any such
income recognised before the asset became non-performing and remaining
unrealised shall be reversed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reversed

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recognised on accrual basis for accounts which continue to be classified as 'standard'
controls.control_description:
In cases of loans where moratorium has been granted for repayment of interest,
income may be recognised on accrual basis for accounts which continue to be
classified as 'standard'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recognised on accrual basis for accounts which continue to be classified as 'standard'

controls.control_objective: To ensure be evaluated against the definition of 'restructuring' provided in reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - resolution of stressed ass
controls.control_description:
This shall be evaluated against the definition of
'restructuring' provided in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be evaluated against the definition of 'restructuring' provided in reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - resolution of stressed ass

controls.control_objective: To ensure be on accrual basis
controls.control_description:
Interest income recognition in respect of borrower accounts where resolution
plan has been implemented in terms of Chapter VI-A of the Reserve Bank of
India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Resolution of Stressed Assets)
Directions, 2025 dated November 28, 2025, shall be on accrual basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be on accrual basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recognized on cash basis
controls.control_description:
For accounts specified at paragraph 36E of these Directions, interest income
shall be recognized on cash basis.]
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recognized on cash basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure make suitable disclosures in their notes to accounts as per the requirements contained in the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies -
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall make suitable disclosures in their Notes to Accounts as per the
requirements contained in the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions,
2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make suitable disclosures in their notes to accounts as per the requirements contained in the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies -

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to the instructions contained in paragraphs 20 to 27
controls.control_description:
These requirements shall be in addition to the instructions contained in
paragraphs 20 to 27.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to the instructions contained in paragraphs 20 to 27

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean one or more of the following assets: (1) an asset, in respect of which, interest has remained overdue for a period of more than 180 days
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean one or more of the following assets: (1) an asset, in respect of which, interest has remained overdue for a period of more than 180 days

controls.control_objective: To ensure classify each such account on the basis of its record of recovery
controls.control_description:
Provided that in the case of lease and hire purchase transactions, an
applicable NBFC shall classify each such account on the basis of its
record of recovery.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to classify each such account on the basis of its record of recovery

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean either of the following: (1) an asset which has been classified as non-performing asset for a period not exceeding 18 months
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean either of the following: (1) an asset which has been classified as non-performing asset for a period not exceeding 18 months

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean (i) a term loan, or (ii) a lease asset, or (iii) a hire purchase asset, or (iv) any other asset, which remains a sub-standard asset for a period
controls.control_description:
Doubtful asset shall mean (i) a term loan, or (ii) a lease asset, or (iii) a hire
purchase asset, or (iv) any other asset, which remains a sub-standard asset for
a period exceeding 18 months.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean (i) a term loan, or (ii) a lease asset, or (iii) a hire purchase asset, or (iv) any other asset, which remains a sub-standard asset for a period

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to the instructions contained in paragraphs 28 to 36
controls.control_description:
These requirements shall be in addition to the instructions contained in
paragraphs 28 to 36.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to the instructions contained in paragraphs 28 to 36

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned for arriving at net npas
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-BL shall make provision for standard assets at 0.25 per cent of the
outstanding, which shall not be reckoned for arriving at net NPAs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned for arriving at net npas

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a sub-standard asset or continue to remain in the same category in which it was prior to its renegotiation or re-schedulement as a doubtful asset o
controls.control_description:
Without prejudice to the instructions contained in the Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025
to a NBFC, hire purchase / leased asset which has been renegotiated or
<image>
rescheduled as referred to in sub-paragraph 43(2) shall be a sub-standard asset
or continue to remain in the same category in which it was prior to its
renegotiation or re-schedulement as a doubtful asset or a loss asset as the case
may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a sub-standard asset or continue to remain in the same category in which it was prior to its renegotiation or re-schedulement as a doubtful asset o

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made as applicable to such asset till it is upgraded
controls.control_description:
Necessary provision shall be made as applicable to such asset till it is
upgraded.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made as applicable to such asset till it is upgraded

controls.control_objective: To ensure be non-performing asset (npa) if any of the following conditions are satisfied: (1) an asset, in respect of which, interest has remained overdue for a
controls.control_description:
For an NBFC-ML, an asset shall be non-performing asset (NPA) if any of the
following conditions are satisfied:
(1) an asset, in respect of which, interest has remained overdue for a period
of more than 90 days;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be non-performing asset (npa) if any of the following conditions are satisfied: (1) an asset, in respect of which, interest has remained overdue for a

controls.control_objective: To ensure classify each such account on the basis of its record of recovery
controls.control_description:
Provided that an NBFC-ML shall classify each such account on the basis
of its record of recovery.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to classify each such account on the basis of its record of recovery

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean either of the following: (1) an asset which has been classified as non-performing asset for a period not exceeding 12 months
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean either of the following: (1) an asset which has been classified as non-performing asset for a period not exceeding 12 months

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean (i) a term loan, or (ii) a lease asset, or (iii) a hire purchase asset, or (iv) any other asset, which remains a sub-standard asset for a period
controls.control_description:
Doubtful asset shall mean (i) a term loan, or (ii) a lease asset, or (iii) a hire
purchase asset, or (iv) any other asset, which remains a sub-standard asset for
a period exceeding twelve months.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean (i) a term loan, or (ii) a lease asset, or (iii) a hire purchase asset, or (iv) any other asset, which remains a sub-standard asset for a period

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned for arriving at net npas
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-ML shall make provisions for standard assets at 0.40 per cent of the
outstanding, which shall not be reckoned for arriving at net NPAs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned for arriving at net npas

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable in respect of microfinance loans as well
controls.control_description:
Explanation: The above rate of standard asset provisioning shall be applicable
in respect of microfinance loans as well.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable in respect of microfinance loans as well

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply mutatis mutandis to a nbfc-ul in addition to the instructions contained in paragraphs 20 to 27
controls.control_description:
The requirements contained in paragraphs 50 to 53 shall apply mutatis mutandis
to a NBFC-UL in addition to the instructions contained in paragraphs 20 to 27.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply mutatis mutandis to a nbfc-ul in addition to the instructions contained in paragraphs 20 to 27

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain provisions in respect of 'standard' assets at the following rates for the funded amount outstanding: category of assets rate of provision ind
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-UL shall maintain provisions in respect of 'standard' assets at the
following rates for the funded amount outstanding:
Category of Assets Rate of Provision Individual housing loans and loans to Small and Micro Enterprises (SMEs)
Explanation: Housing loans extended at teaser rates shall mean housing loans
having comparatively lower rates of interest in the first few years after which the
rates of interest are reset at higher rates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain provisions in respect of 'standard' assets at the following rates for the funded amount outstanding: category of assets rate of provision ind

controls.control_objective: To ensure also attract provisioning requirement as applicable to the loan assets in the 'standard' category, of the concerned counterparties
controls.control_description:
Current credit exposures arising on account of the permitted derivative
transactions shall also attract provisioning requirement as applicable to the loan
assets in the 'standard' category, of the concerned counterparties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also attract provisioning requirement as applicable to the loan assets in the 'standard' category, of the concerned counterparties

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean the sum of the gross positive mark-to-market value of all derivative contracts with respect to a single counterparty, without adjusting against a
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of paragraph 59, current credit exposure shall mean the sum of
the gross positive mark-to-market value of all derivative contracts with respect to
a single counterparty, without adjusting against any negative marked-to-market
values of contracts with the same counterparty.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean the sum of the gross positive mark-to-market value of all derivative contracts with respect to a single counterparty, without adjusting against a

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The directions, instructions and guidelines already repealed
vide any of the directions, instructions, and guidelines listed in the above
notification shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may
be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or
punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or
guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the Reserve Bank may, if it considers necessary, issue
necessary clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the
interpretation of any provision of these Directions given by the Reserve Bank
shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
